@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor(loadUser)
C: minimal_behavior_change ∧ same_validation_order ∧ single_next_err_path
P: promisify(db.findUser) → async/await
V: check_id_is_present ∧ user_exists_in_db ∧ log_and_cache_operations
R: ! error_handling_in_async_flow ∧ ! db_response_variability
A: refactor_to_use_async_await_with_one_next_err_path

[AUDIT]
Ensure logs are correctly captured during the refactor.
